problems_encountered.description: API returned 403 Forbidden when attempting to revoke invite 17678669-cbe6-44ae-82ac-b6c4f88e3a26. User may lack permission to revoke organization invitations (possibly requires owner role).

tool_response_summary: Failed to revoke organization invite due to 403 permission error. Expected 204 response but got 403. Response time: 55.94ms
execution_notes: Tool executed but failed with permission error. Likely requires owner-level permissions to revoke invitations. Current user role may be insufficient for this operation.
